auth.label: Personal Access Token
auth.description: V2EX Personal Access Token used as a Bearer token for API 2.0 requests. Create or manage tokens from your V2EX token settings.

actions.name: boost_topic
actions.description: Boost one of the authenticated member's V2EX topics to the homepage.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for boosting a V2EX topic.

success.description: Whether the V2EX request was accepted.

outputSchema.description: The empty response returned after V2EX accepts the request.

actions.name: create_token
actions.description: Create a new V2EX Personal Access Token from an existing token.

scope.description: The access scope for the new V2EX token.

anyOf.description: A 30-day token lifetime in seconds.
A 60-day token lifetime in seconds.
A 90-day token lifetime in seconds.
A 180-day token lifetime in seconds.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a V2EX Personal Access Token.

token.description: The newly created Personal Access Token value.

actions.name: delete_notification
actions.description: Delete one V2EX notification by its numeric identifier.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting a V2EX notification.

success.description: Whether the V2EX request was accepted.

outputSchema.description: The empty response returned after V2EX accepts the request.

actions.name: get_current_member
actions.description: Fetch the authenticated V2EX member profile.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching the authenticated V2EX member.

url.description: The V2EX URL for the member profile.

website.description: The member website URL or empty string.

twitter.description: The member Twitter handle or empty string.

psn.description: The member PlayStation Network handle or empty string.

github.description: The member GitHub username or profile value.

btc.description: The member Bitcoin address or empty string.

location.description: The member location or empty string.

tagline.description: The member tagline or empty string.

created.description: The Unix timestamp when the member account was created.

last_modified.description: The Unix timestamp when the profile was last modified.

pro.description: Whether the member has V2EX Pro status as returned by V2EX.

actions.name: get_current_token
actions.description: Fetch metadata for the V2EX Personal Access Token used by this connection.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching current V2EX token metadata.

token.description: The token value as returned by V2EX. It may be masked after creation.

good_for_days.description: The remaining token lifetime in days.

total_used.description: The total number of times the token has been used.

last_used.description: The Unix timestamp when the token was last used.

created.description: The Unix timestamp when the token was created.

token.description: Metadata for a V2EX Personal Access Token.

actions.name: get_node
actions.description: Fetch a V2EX node by node name.

node_name.description: The V2EX node name, such as `python`.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching a V2EX node.

founder_id.description: The member identifier of the node founder.

url.description: The V2EX URL for the node.

topics.description: The number of topics in the node.

created.description: The Unix timestamp when the node was created.

last_modified.description: The Unix timestamp when the node was last modified.

actions.name: get_topic
actions.description: Fetch a V2EX topic by numeric identifier.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching a V2EX topic.

syntax.description: The content syntax mode returned by V2EX.

url.description: The V2EX URL for the topic.

replies.description: The number of replies on the topic.

stars.description: The number of stars on the topic.

thanks.description: The number of thanks on the topic.

last_reply_by.description: The username of the latest reply author, or empty string.

created.description: The Unix timestamp when the topic was created.

last_modified.description: The Unix timestamp when the topic was last modified.

last_touched.description: The Unix timestamp when the topic was last touched.

website.description: The member website URL or empty string.

github.description: The member GitHub username or profile value.

url.description: The V2EX URL for the member profile.

created.description: The Unix timestamp when the member account was created.

pro.description: Whether the member has V2EX Pro status as returned by V2EX.

founder_id.description: The member identifier of the node founder.

url.description: The V2EX URL for the node.

topics.description: The number of topics in the node.

created.description: The Unix timestamp when the node was created.

last_modified.description: The Unix timestamp when the node was last modified.

supplements.description: Supplement objects attached to the topic.

actions.name: list_hot_topics
actions.description: Fetch public hot topics from the V2EX legacy JSON API.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching V2EX legacy hot topics.

url.description: The V2EX URL for the topic.

replies.description: The number of replies on the topic.

deleted.description: Whether the topic has been deleted as returned by V2EX.

last_reply_by.description: The username of the latest reply author, or empty string.

created.description: The Unix timestamp when the topic was created.

last_modified.description: The Unix timestamp when the topic was last modified.

last_touched.description: The Unix timestamp when the topic was last touched.

url.description: The V2EX URL for the member profile.

anyOf.description: The member website URL, empty string, or null.
The member Twitter handle, empty string, or null.
The member PlayStation Network handle, empty string, or null.
The member GitHub username, profile value, empty string, or null.
The member Bitcoin address, empty string, or null.
The member location, empty string, or null.
The member tagline, empty string, or null.
The member biography text, empty string, or null.

created.description: The Unix timestamp when the member account was created.

last_modified.description: The Unix timestamp when the member profile was last modified.

pro.description: Whether the member has V2EX Pro status as returned by V2EX.

member.description: A member object returned by the V2EX legacy public API.

url.description: The V2EX URL for the node.

topics.description: The number of topics in the node.

stars.description: The number of stars on the node.

founder_id.description: The member identifier of the node founder.

root.description: Whether this node is a root node.

anyOf.description: The parent node name, empty string, or null.

node.description: A node object returned by the V2EX legacy public API.

items.description: A topic object returned by the V2EX legacy public API.

topics.description: The public topics returned by the V2EX legacy endpoint.

outputSchema.description: The V2EX legacy public topic list response.

actions.name: list_latest_topics
actions.description: Fetch public latest topics from the V2EX legacy JSON API.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching V2EX legacy latest topics.

url.description: The V2EX URL for the topic.

replies.description: The number of replies on the topic.

deleted.description: Whether the topic has been deleted as returned by V2EX.

last_reply_by.description: The username of the latest reply author, or empty string.

created.description: The Unix timestamp when the topic was created.

last_modified.description: The Unix timestamp when the topic was last modified.

last_touched.description: The Unix timestamp when the topic was last touched.

url.description: The V2EX URL for the member profile.

anyOf.description: The member website URL, empty string, or null.
The member Twitter handle, empty string, or null.
The member PlayStation Network handle, empty string, or null.
The member GitHub username, profile value, empty string, or null.
The member Bitcoin address, empty string, or null.
The member location, empty string, or null.
The member tagline, empty string, or null.
The member biography text, empty string, or null.

created.description: The Unix timestamp when the member account was created.

last_modified.description: The Unix timestamp when the member profile was last modified.

pro.description: Whether the member has V2EX Pro status as returned by V2EX.

member.description: A member object returned by the V2EX legacy public API.

url.description: The V2EX URL for the node.

topics.description: The number of topics in the node.

stars.description: The number of stars on the node.

founder_id.description: The member identifier of the node founder.

root.description: Whether this node is a root node.

anyOf.description: The parent node name, empty string, or null.

node.description: A node object returned by the V2EX legacy public API.

items.description: A topic object returned by the V2EX legacy public API.

topics.description: The public topics returned by the V2EX legacy endpoint.

outputSchema.description: The V2EX legacy public topic list response.

actions.name: list_node_topics
actions.description: Fetch topics from a V2EX node.

node_name.description: The V2EX node name, such as `python`.

p.description: Optional page number to request. Defaults to 1.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching topics from a V2EX node.

syntax.description: The content syntax mode returned by V2EX.

url.description: The V2EX URL for the topic.

replies.description: The number of replies on the topic.

stars.description: The number of stars on the topic.

thanks.description: The number of thanks on the topic.

last_reply_by.description: The username of the latest reply author, or empty string.

created.description: The Unix timestamp when the topic was created.

last_modified.description: The Unix timestamp when the topic was last modified.

last_touched.description: The Unix timestamp when the topic was last touched.

website.description: The member website URL or empty string.

github.description: The member GitHub username or profile value.

url.description: The V2EX URL for the member profile.

created.description: The Unix timestamp when the member account was created.

pro.description: Whether the member has V2EX Pro status as returned by V2EX.

founder_id.description: The member identifier of the node founder.

url.description: The V2EX URL for the node.

topics.description: The number of topics in the node.

created.description: The Unix timestamp when the node was created.

last_modified.description: The Unix timestamp when the node was last modified.

supplements.description: Supplement objects attached to the topic.

topics.description: The topics returned for this node page.

actions.name: list_notifications
actions.description: Fetch the latest V2EX notifications for the authenticated member.

p.description: Optional page number to request. Defaults to 1.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching V2EX notifications.

member_id.description: The member identifier that triggered the notification.

for_member_id.description: The member identifier that received the notification.

anyOf.description: The notification payload string.

created.description: The Unix timestamp when the notification was created.

member.description: The member object associated with the notification.

notifications.description: The notifications returned for this page.

total.description: The total notification count parsed from the V2EX pagination message.

actions.name: list_topic_replies
actions.description: Fetch replies for a V2EX topic.

p.description: Optional page number to request. Defaults to 1.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching replies for a V2EX topic.

created.description: The Unix timestamp when the reply was created.

website.description: The member website URL or empty string.

github.description: The member GitHub username or profile value.

url.description: The V2EX URL for the member profile.

created.description: The Unix timestamp when the member account was created.

pro.description: Whether the member has V2EX Pro status as returned by V2EX.

replies.description: The replies returned for this topic page.

actions.name: set_topic_sticky
actions.description: Set one of the authenticated member's V2EX topics as sticky.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for setting a V2EX topic as sticky.

success.description: Whether the V2EX request was accepted.

outputSchema.description: The empty response returned after V2EX accepts the request.
